title: Framed Vertical Poster
description:
These premium matte posters, printed with high-quality inks on museum-grade photo paper, are available in a variety of secure framing finishes to match your decor. Each framed poster includes hanging hardware for easy display. The durable framing, crafted from MDF (Sensaria) or Ayous wood (Printify Choice), is designed for low maintenance and resists swelling and warping.

.:Museum-quality matte paper

.:Paper weight: 200 g/m² (Sensaria), 189 g/m² (Printify Choice)

.:Frame: MDF (Sensaria), Ayous wood (Printify Choice)

.: Protective acrylic cover

.:Hanging hardware is built into the back of the frame (Sensaria) or included in the package (Printify Choice)
